summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Injury Intelligence Layer Phase 1 (Basketball). All 47 new pytest tests pass, 839 total tests pass with no regressions. Endpoint testing confirms correct authentication, sport filtering, schema validation, fail-soft behavior, and impact scoring logic. All caps respected (confidence <= 12, fragility <= 15).

notes: API-Sports basketball injuries endpoint returns 'skipped' status for test matches (likely due to team_ids not being in NBA/major leagues)
TheStatsAPI, ESPN, and Rotowire sources are feature-flagged OFF by default as expected
All external API calls are properly mocked in pytest tests

passed_tests: Authentication: 401 without Bearer token, 404 for non-existent match
Sport filtering: Baseball and football return sport_not_supported_phase1_basketball_only
Basketball schema: Correct schema_version='injury-intel.basketball.1', all required fields present
Source status: All sources (api_sports, thestatsapi, espn, rotowire, official, editorial_context) reported
No injuries scenario: Returns available:false with _reason='no_injuries_reported'
Fail-soft: Invalid team_ids don't break endpoint, returns valid payload structure
Edge calculation: net_edge (neutral/home/away), net_edge_points, edge_tier (SMALL/MODERATE/STRONG) all valid
Caps validation: confidence_adjustment <= 12, fragility_adjustment <= 15 respected
Freshness values: Valid values (fresh/partial/stale/unknown)
High volatility: Correctly set to true when both teams have HIGH or CRITICAL impact_tier
Impact scoring - Superstar OUT: Generates SUPERSTAR_OUT reason_code, team_strength_adjustment <= -14, impact_tier CRITICAL or HIGH
Impact scoring - Multiple starters OUT: Generates MULTIPLE_STARTERS_OUT reason_code, extra accumulation penalty applied
Impact scoring - Questionable star: Generates QUESTIONABLE_STAR_RISK reason_code, moderate penalty (-8 to -4)
Impact scoring - Probable status: Does not strongly penalize (>= -1)
Impact scoring - Minutes restriction: Generates MINUTES_RESTRICTION_KEY_PLAYER reason_code for key players
Impact scoring - Defensive outs: Multiple defensive outs generate DEFENSIVE_ANCHOR_OUT reason_code
Normalize status: All documented synonyms correctly mapped (out, doubtful, questionable, probable, etc.)
Merge player records: Conservative conflict resolution (more severe status wins), deduplication by name
Compute freshness: TTL boundaries correct (2h pregame / 30m game-day for basketball)
Classify player role: Registry lookup (NBA_SUPERSTARS, NBA_STARS), heuristic fallback, hint priority
Orchestrator: Fail-soft with no sources, invalid input handling, cache integration
Orchestrator: Match edge calculation with mocked sources (LeBron OUT on home -> net_edge='away')
Orchestrator: Caps enforced even with massive injuries (5 superstars OUT)
MLB isolation: Injury Intelligence does not affect MLB modules
All 839 pytest tests pass (no regressions)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (22/22 endpoint tests, 47/47 pytest tests, 839/839 total tests)
